# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for a Network Security Group that allows our remote development team to access Azure VMs. Include rules for RDP (port 3389), SSH (port 22), HTTP (port 80), and HTTPS (port 443) from any source (0.0.0.0/0). The team works globally and needs flexible access.
# Category: cloud_network_security

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "nsgName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "RemoteDevTeam-NSG",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Name of the Network Security Group for the remote development team"
      }
    },
    "location": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[resourceGroup().location]",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Location for the Network Security Group"
      }
    }
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups",
      "apiVersion": "2023-04-01",
      "name": "[parameters('nsgName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "tags": {
        "environment": "development",
        "purpose": "remote-dev-team-access",
        "managedBy": "ARM-template"
      },
      "properties": {
        "securityRules": [
          {
            "name": "Allow-RDP-Inbound",
            "properties": {
              "description": "Allow RDP access for remote development team to connect to Windows VMs",
              "protocol": "Tcp",
              "sourcePortRange": "*",
              "destinationPortRange": "3389",
              "sourceAddressPrefix": "0.0.0.0/0",
              "destinationAddressPrefix": "*",
              "access": "Allow",
              "priority": 100,
              "direction": "Inbound"
            }
          },
          {
            "name": "Allow-SSH-Inbound",
            "properties": {
              "description": "Allow SSH access for remote development team to connect to Linux VMs",
              "protocol": "Tcp",
              "sourcePortRange": "*",
              "destinationPortRange": "22",
              "sourceAddressPrefix": "0.0.0.0/0",
              "destinationAddressPrefix": "*",
              "access": "Allow",
              "priority": 110,
              "direction": "Inbound"
            }
          },
          {
            "name": "Allow-HTTP-Inbound",
            "properties": {
              "description": "Allow HTTP access for web application testing and development",
              "protocol": "Tcp",
              "sourcePortRange": "*",
              "destinationPortRange": "80",
              "sourceAddressPrefix": "0.0.0.0/0",
              "destinationAddressPrefix": "*",
              "access": "Allow",
              "priority": 120,
              "direction": "Inbound"
            }
          },
          {
            "name": "Allow-HTTPS-Inbound",
            "properties": {
              "description": "Allow HTTPS access for secure web application testing and development",
              "protocol": "Tcp",
              "sourcePortRange": "*",
              "destinationPortRange": "443",
              "sourceAddressPrefix": "0.0.0.0/0",
              "destinationAddressPrefix": "*",
              "access": "Allow",
              "priority": 130,
              "direction": "Inbound"
            }
          },
          {
            "name": "Deny-All-Other-Inbound",
            "properties": {
              "description": "Deny all other inbound traffic not explicitly allowed",
              "protocol": "*",
              "sourcePortRange": "*",
              "destinationPortRange": "*",
              "sourceAddressPrefix": "*",
              "destinationAddressPrefix": "*",
              "access": "Deny",
              "priority": 4096,
              "direction": "Inbound"
            }
          }
        ]
      }
    }
  ],
  "outputs": {
    "nsgId": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups', parameters('nsgName'))]",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Resource ID of the created Network Security Group"
      }
    },
    "nsgName": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[parameters('nsgName')]",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Name of the created Network Security Group"
      }
    },
    "securityRulesSummary": {
      "type": "array",
      "value": [
        {
          "ruleName": "Allow-RDP-Inbound",
          "port": "3389",
          "priority": 100
        },
        {
          "ruleName": "Allow-SSH-Inbound",
          "port": "22",
          "priority": 110
        },
        {
          "ruleName": "Allow-HTTP-Inbound",
          "port": "80",
          "priority": 120
        },
        {
          "ruleName": "Allow-HTTPS-Inbound",
          "port": "443",
          "priority": 130
        },
        {
          "ruleName": "Deny-All-Other-Inbound",
          "port": "*",
          "priority": 4096
        }
      ],
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Summary of all configured security rules"
      }
    }
  }
}
